parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH zuora_latest AS (
  SELECT
    pc.account_id,
    pc.plan_name                          AS zuora_plan,
    pc.mrr                                AS zuora_mrr,
    pc.subscription_status                AS zuora_subscription_status,
    pc.billing_period                     AS zuora_billing_cycle,
    pc.quantity                           AS zuora_listing_quantity
  FROM `guesty-data.zuora_analytics.product_catalog` pc
  WHERE pc.subscription_status = 'Active'
    AND pc.account_id IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
  da.account_id,
  da.account_name,
  da.account_created_at,

  sf.Package__c                           AS sf_package,
  sf.Average_MRR__c                       AS sf_mrr,
  sf.Guesty_Contract_Status__c            AS sf_contract_status,
  da.billing_cycle                        AS sf_billing_cycle,
  sf.Number_of_Listings__c               AS sf_listing_count,

  z.zuora_plan,
  z.zuora_mrr,
  z.zuora_subscription_status,
  z.zuora_billing_cycle,
  z.zuora_listing_quantity

FROM `guesty-data.guesty_analytics.dim_accounts` da
JOIN `guesty-data.salesforce.sf_account` sf
  ON da.account_id = sf.Guesty_Admin_ID__c
LEFT JOIN zuora_latest z
  ON da.account_id = z.account_id

WHERE IFNULL(da.account_active, FALSE) = TRUE
  AND IFNULL(da.is_churn, FALSE) = FALSE
  AND da.account_created_at IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY da.account_created_at DESC
